name: Lotus Rice
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Brown rice, short grained - uncooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the rice and lotus seeds and place them in a pressure cooker.
2. Add water and soak for 3 to 5 hours until softened.
3. Add salt and secure the lid.
4. On medium-high heat, bring the pressure up to 15 pounds.
5. Lower the heat and place a flame deflector or heat diffuser beneath the pressure cooker.
6. Cook for 50 minutes.
7. Remove from heat and allow the pressure to reduce.
8. Mix in almonds and serve hot.
Per serving: 421 cal; 9 g prot; 236 mg sod; 68 g carb; 12 g fat; 0 mg chol; 70 mg calcium
From the files of DEEANNE
